title: Hash Table — Count Collisions
description: Given a hash table of capacity m and n keys to insert, compute how many collisions occur (a collision happens when a key hashes to a bucket that already contains at least one element). Use simple modular hashing: h(k) = k mod m.
inputSpec: First line: m (capacity) and n (number of keys). Second line: n integer keys.

botCodes.code:
m,n=map(int,input().split())
keys=list(map(int,input().split()))
buckets=[0]*m
coll=0
for k in keys:
    h=k%m
    if buckets[h]>0:coll+=1
    buckets[h]+=1
print(coll)

#include<stdio.h>
int main(){int m,n;scanf("%d %d",&m,&n);int b[1001]={0};int c=0;for(int i=0;i<n;i++){int k;scanf("%d",&k);int h=((k%m)+m)%m;if(b[h]>0)c++;b[h]++;}printf("%d\n",c);}

let()=let m=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id and n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let b=Array.make m 0 in let c=ref 0 in for _=1 to n do let k=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let h=((k mod m)+m) mod m in if b.(h)>0 then incr c;b.(h)<-b.(h)+1 done;Printf.printf"%d\n" !c
